codex_cli_continuous_dev|nl_cases_codex_cli_continuous_dev_20260711_create_calc_project_zh|covers:continuous_dev,coding,create_files,run_tests,json_output,client_like,requires_tool_call=true,local_side_effect,aggregate|在 run/nl_eval_tmp/codex_cli_continuous_20260711_new 创建一个小型 Python 项目：新建 calc_core.py，实现 add(a,b) 和 sub(a,b)；新建 test_calc_core.py，覆盖这两个函数；运行 python3 test_calc_core.py。最后只输出 JSON，包含 created_files、test_command、test_status。
codex_cli_continuous_dev|nl_cases_codex_cli_continuous_dev_20260711_extend_mul_zh|covers:continuous_dev,coding,modify_files,run_tests,json_output,client_like,requires_tool_call=true,local_side_effect,aggregate|继续刚才这个项目：给 calc_core.py 增加 mul(a,b)，把 test_calc_core.py 更新到真实测试 add、sub、mul；运行 python3 test_calc_core.py。最后只输出 JSON，包含 changed_files、test_command、test_status、functions。

task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_local_process_poll_terminal_en|covers:poll_async_job,local_process_poll,terminal_projection,succeeded,checkpoint,requires_tool_call=false,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,client_like,aggregate|Dry run only: return the machine-token shape for a local-process async poll terminal projection. Include adapter_kind=local_process_poll, status=succeeded, terminal_projection, checkpoint_id, and result_ref tokens. Do not inspect files and do not start a job.
task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_local_process_cancel_contract_zh|covers:poll_async_job,local_process_poll,cancel_ref,cancelled,terminal_projection,task_lifecycle,requires_tool_call=false,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,client_like,aggregate|只做 dry-run，不要读取配置文件、不要检查 TOML、不要取消真实任务：按本地进程异步任务取消协议返回机器 token 示例，必须包含 cancel_ref、adapter_kind=local_process_poll、status=cancelled 和 terminal_projection。
task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_task_control_resume_pause_dry_run_zh|covers:task_control,resume,pause,checkpoint,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,requires_tool_call=true,client_like,aggregate|只做 dry_run，不要实际恢复或暂停任务：对 task_id=00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000010 预览 task_control.resume(checkpoint_id=ckpt-1)，并预览 task_control.pause(pause_seconds=120)；最终必须包含 task_control.resume.dry_run、task_control.pause.dry_run 和 checkpoint_id。
task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_async_expiry_policy_en|covers:poll_async_job,expired,async_timeout_policy,effective_deadline,terminal_projection,requires_tool_call=false,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,client_like,aggregate|Dry run only: describe the structured async timeout policy fields used to decide whether a pending async job is expired before polling.
